name: Spicy Szechwan Sauteed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Hot bean paste, chili sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat wok with oil over high heat and stir in garlic, ginger, and chicken pieces.
2. Cook for 2-2 1/2 minutes until the chicken is browned.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (excluding broccoli florets and cornstarch) and stir for a further 1-2 minutes, mixing well.
4. Thicken the sauce with cornstarch if needed.
5. Place the chicken in the center of a dish with broccoli florets on each side.
